code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut c0 = 0
  mut c1 = 0
  mut c2 = 0
  mut c3 = 0
  mut c4 = 0
  mut c5 = 0
  mut c6 = 0
  mut c7 = 0
  mut c8 = 0
  mut c9 = 0

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      match b
      when 48
        c0 = c0 + 1
      when 49
        c1 = c1 + 1
      when 50
        c2 = c2 + 1
      when 51
        c3 = c3 + 1
      when 52
        c4 = c4 + 1
      when 53
        c5 = c5 + 1
      when 54
        c6 = c6 + 1
      when 55
        c7 = c7 + 1
      when 56
        c8 = c8 + 1
      when 57
        c9 = c9 + 1
      when _
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  let counts = [c0, c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8, c9]
  mut d = 0
  while d < 10
    mut bars = ""
    mut k = 0
    let cnt = match counts.get(d)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    while k < cnt
      bars = "#{bars}#"
      k = k + 1
    end
    println("#{d}: #{bars}")
    d = d + 1
  end
end
